DISCOVERY 302, NO OBJECTION TO DEFENDANTS PAUL GAETANI, GAETANI REAL ESTATE, INC, HELENA GALATOLO, BRADMAR APARTMENTS, LLC, ANGIE MOORE, NDA PROPERTIES, INC, DOROTHY STECKLER, AND BRADY STREET, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITIONS OF PLAINTIFFS CHRIS DAY AND TED STRRAWSER HAVING BEEN FILED THE COURT WILL GRANT DEFENDANTS' MOTION AND ASSESS SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFFS AND THEIR COUNSEL IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 WITH SANCTIONS TO BE PAID WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Plaintiffs Chris Daly And Ted Strawser And For Monetary Sanctions Against Said Plaintiffs And Their Counsel In The Sum Of $4,037.50
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MICHAEL D. STEIN, ESQ. of Tisdale & Nicholson, LLP, Tel No. 310-286-1260 appearing telephonically for Defendants Paul Gaetani, Gaetani Real Estate, Inc., Helena Galatolo, et al.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. NO OBJECTION TO DEFENDANTS PAUL GAETANI, GAETANI REAL ESTATE, INC, HELENA GALATOLO, BRADMAR APARTMENTS, LLC, ANGIE MOORE, NDA PROPERTIES, INC, DOROTHY STECKLER, AND BRADY STREET, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITIONS OF PLAINTIFFS CHRIS DAY AND TED STRRAWSER HAVING BEEN FILED THE COURT WILL GRANT DEFENDANTS' MOTION AND ASSESS SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFFS AND THEIR COUNSEL IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 WITH SANCTIONS TO BE PAID WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. THE DEPOSITIONS WILL BE TAKEN NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 12, 2016. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS ORDER MAY RESULT IN FURTHER DISCCOVERY SANCTIONS. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS SHALL PREPARE AN APPROPRIATE ORDER, SUBMIT TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND SUBMIT A COPY TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
